defaultBugReport.title: Login button unresponsive on mobile Safari
defaultBugReport.stepsToReproduce:
1. Open the app on mobile Safari
2. Navigate to /login
3. Enter valid credentials
4. Tap the 'Sign In' button
defaultBugReport.expectedResult: User should be authenticated and redirected to the dashboard page.
defaultBugReport.actualResult: The 'Sign In' button does not respond to tap events. No network request is triggered. The button hover state activates but the click/tap handler does not fire.
defaultBugReport.additionalNotes: Issue only occurs on Safari mobile. Chrome and Firefox mobile work correctly. Potentially related to the CSS touch-action property or event listener binding.
